steps.title: Connect of to its objects
steps.content: The phrase is "themes of healing, self-discovery, and memory." The preposition "of" should connect directly to the series of objects that follows it.

steps.title: Avoid splitting the phrase
steps.content: B inserts a comma between the preposition and its objects. C inserts a dash in the same place. D inserts a colon, but no list needs to be introduced after a complete independent clause. The answer is A.
